# GameZipper - Free Online Games
> 21 free browser-based HTML5 games. No download, no signup required. Play instantly in any modern web browser on desktop or mobile.

## About
GameZipper is a collection of free online HTML5 games playable instantly in any browser. All games are free, require no downloads or accounts, and work on desktop and mobile devices.

## Games
- 2048 Galaxy: Classic 2048 number sliding puzzle with space theme. Slide tiles to combine them and reach 2048. URL: https://gamezipper.com/2048/
- Ocean Gem Pop: Match-3 puzzle game with ocean gems. Swap adjacent gems to create matches of 3 or more. URL: https://gamezipper.com/ocean-gem-pop/
- Snake: Classic snake arcade game. Control your snake, eat food to grow longer, avoid walls and your own tail. URL: https://gamezipper.com/snake/
- Brick Breaker: Classic breakout/brick-breaker arcade game. Bounce a ball to smash bricks and collect power-ups across 50 levels. URL: https://gamezipper.com/brick-breaker/
- Flappy Wings: One-tap endless arcade game. Tap to fly through gaps between pipes and beat your high score. URL: https://gamezipper.com/flappy-wings/
- Memory Match: Card matching memory game. Flip cards and find matching pairs to train your memory. URL: https://gamezipper.com/memory-match/
- Word Puzzle: Daily word guessing puzzle. Guess the 5-letter word in 6 tries with color-coded hints. URL: https://gamezipper.com/word-puzzle/
- Typing Speed Test: Typing speed and accuracy test. Measure your WPM and improve your typing skills. URL: https://gamezipper.com/typing-speed/
- Idle Clicker: Magic-themed idle clicker game. Click to earn resources and upgrade your magical powers. URL: https://gamezipper.com/idle-clicker/
- Stacker: Block stacking precision arcade game. Time your taps to stack moving blocks as high as possible. URL: https://gamezipper.com/stacker/
- Whack-A-Mole: Classic whack-a-mole reflex game. Hit moles as they pop up from holes before time runs out. URL: https://gamezipper.com/whack-a-mole/
- Bolt Jam 3D: 3D screw and bolt puzzle game. Unscrew bolts and sort colored discs to solve mechanical puzzles. URL: https://gamezipper.com/bolt-jam-3d/
- Catch Turkey: Turkey catching arcade game. Catch falling turkeys before they hit the ground to score points. URL: https://gamezipper.com/catch-turkey/
- Color Sort Puzzle: Color sorting puzzle game. Sort colored balls into matching tubes by moving them strategically. URL: https://gamezipper.com/color-sort/
- Dessert Blast: Match-3 candy/dessert puzzle game. Swap and match sweet dessert pieces in rows of 3 or more. URL: https://gamezipper.com/dessert-blast/
- Kitty Cafe: Cat cafe management casual game. Run your own cat cafe, serve customers, and unlock new cats. URL: https://gamezipper.com/kitty-cafe/
- SlackOff Defense: Office defense casual game. Place screen barriers to hide your slacking from your boss across 8 waves. URL: https://gamezipper.com/mo-yu-fayu/
- Paint Splash: Color-by-number painting puzzle game. Fill numbered sections with the correct colors to complete artwork. URL: https://gamezipper.com/paint-splash/
- Phantom Blade: Action arcade game. Slash enemies with your blade and survive waves of attackers. URL: https://gamezipper.com/phantom-blade/
- Sushi Stack 3D: 3D sushi stacking puzzle game. Stack sushi pieces precisely in 3D to clear levels. URL: https://gamezipper.com/sushi-stack/
- Wood Block Puzzle: Wood block puzzle game. Place wooden block pieces to fill complete rows and columns on the grid. URL: https://gamezipper.com/wood-block-puzzle/

## Categories
- Puzzle Games: 2048 Galaxy, Word Puzzle, Memory Match, Color Sort Puzzle, Bolt Jam 3D, Dessert Blast, Paint Splash, Sushi Stack 3D, Wood Block Puzzle
- Arcade Games: Snake, Brick Breaker, Flappy Wings, Stacker, Whack-A-Mole, Catch Turkey, Phantom Blade
- Casual Games: Idle Clicker, Kitty Cafe, SlackOff Defense
- Typing & Education: Typing Speed Test, Ocean Gem Pop

## Website
URL: https://gamezipper.com/
